title: The War at Marineford Begins: Key Exchange
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #12 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's Got KaiRouseki in it....!! Damn you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's way stronger than he was before!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can see exactly why it was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: m... my strength is fading... dammit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THAT JITE... get it off me...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So this is the Kuja's Haki....!!
